description: B600N and B600S are parallel intakes (north/south spine) not series. naming_index_chain wrongly inferred parent-child. Removed via topology_overrides.
Patched from 9 children's readings (sum aggregation). Counter froze Jan 17 then reset to 0 on Feb 2.
Counter degrading: intermittent reads then 3-day flat then backlog flush (234 MWh in one day). Transition period before full offline.
Counter flat for 6 days — summer shutdown. Self-recovering.
Single-day flat reading (delta=0). Next day shows 200 MWh (two days accumulated).
Device replacement. Old counter ended at 19693. New device started at 1934. Stitched via rolling_sum derived ref.
Counter reset to 0.001 and stayed dead. Patched from child B642.VMM71.
Counter dropped from 25231 to 10890 for 3 days then reverted. Temporary register glitch. Readings excluded via validity split.
B642.VMM72 flow exceeds parent B614.VMM71 by 2-7x during Jan and Apr-Jun. PDF confirms downstream. Suspected undocumented additional steam feed. Needs on-site investigation.
Counter frozen since Mar 12. Leaf meter — cannot patch.
Counter at 0 for entire observation window. Leaf meter — cannot patch.
Counter at 0 for entire observation window. Leaf meter — cannot patch.
Multiple frozen periods (Jun 20 / Jun 30 / Jul 12). Intermittent meter — reads some weeks then goes flat.
Counter frozen from Feb 19 onwards. Leaf meter — cannot patch.
B600N north spine has 60% unmetered flow. Only 40% of intake captured by downstream meters (B616/B643/B833/B921). Missing meters or undocumented consumers.
31% of total site steam intake not accounted for by downstream meters. South spine 14% (acceptable). North spine 60% (missing meters).
